artifact_refs.description: manually reproduce the preprocessing pipeline using the candidate action bank.
Run-level metadata for the human baseline.
Per-action mapping from CA-IDs to notebook evidence and selection rationale.

notes: First-pass human selection includes the main date, lookup, oil interpolation, transferred-holiday filtering, calendar, family encoding, and id-drop steps, but omits the transactions join, oil rolling feature, Work Day holiday cleanup, and grouped sales lag features.
